● Active Collaboration
🔒 Non-Disclosure Agreement
Protect your collaboration. Send an NDA for both parties to sign.
Collaboration started — say hello! 👋

Non-Disclosure Agreement

MASSED Platform — Collaboration NDA
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
MASSED Platform — Collaboration Agreement

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of the date of digital acceptance by and between the two collaborating parties on the MASSED platform ("Party A" and "Party B," collectively the "Parties").

1. PURPOSE. The Parties wish to explore and engage in a professional collaboration ("Purpose"). In connection with this Purpose, each Party may disclose or receive certain Confidential Information.

2. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. "Confidential Information" means any non-public information disclosed by one Party to the other, including but not limited to: business strategies, marketing plans, financial data, client information, creative works, personal brand assets, trade secrets, product plans, pricing, and any other proprietary information, whether disclosed orally, in writing, or digitally through the MASSED platform.

3. OBLIGATIONS. Each Party agrees to: (a) hold all Confidential Information in strict confidence; (b) not disclose Confidential Information to any third party without prior written consent; (c) use Confidential Information solely for the Purpose of this collaboration; (d) protect the Confidential Information with at least the same degree of care used to protect its own confidential information, but no less than reasonable care.

4. EXCLUSIONS. This Agreement does not apply to information that: (a) is or becomes publicly known through no breach of this Agreement; (b) was known to the receiving Party prior to disclosure; (c) is independently developed without use of Confidential Information; (d) is required to be disclosed by law or court order.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY. Nothing in this Agreement grants either Party any rights in the other Party's intellectual property, trademarks, copyrights, or brand assets. All creative works, brand materials, and content produced during the collaboration remain the property of their respective creators unless separately agreed upon in writing.

6. TERM. This Agreement shall remain in effect for a period of two (2) years from the date of acceptance, or until the collaboration is formally concluded, whichever is later.

7. REMEDIES. Each Party acknowledges that breach of this Agreement may cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages may be insufficient, and agrees that the non-breaching Party shall be entitled to seek equitable relief in addition to any other remedies available.

8. DIGITAL ACCEPTANCE. By clicking "I Agree & Sign" within the MASSED platform, each Party acknowledges that they have read, understood, and agree to be legally bound by the terms of this Agreement. The Parties agree that this digital signature constitutes a valid and legally binding signature equivalent to a handwritten signature under applicable law.

9. GOVERNING LAW. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which the MASSED platform operates, without regard to conflict of law principles.

Party A (You)
Party B (Collaborator)
⚠️ Legal Notice: By clicking "I Agree & Sign" below, you acknowledge that this digital signature is legally binding and that this Agreement shall serve as a valid legal document. Both parties must sign for the NDA to take effect.

Platform Support
How to use MASSED
Click any Quick Help guide below for a full popup walkthrough. Use Contact Support to send a message or create a ticket.
Quick Help Guides
Contact Support
📬 Our support team responds within 24–48 hours. For urgent billing issues include your account email in your message.
🔌
API Integrations
Coming Soon
Connect Mailchimp, ConvertKit, Zapier, Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel and more. API integrations are coming in the next update.
🐒 Mailchimp ⚡ Zapier 📊 Google Analytics 📘 Meta Pixel 🎵 TikTok Pixel 🔌 Custom API
What We Collect
We collect information you provide — name, email, phone, profile content, and payment details. We also collect usage data (pages visited, features used, device type) to improve the platform.
How We Use It
To operate your account, process payouts, send notifications you opt into, and improve MASSED. We never sell your personal data to third parties.
Data Sharing
Only with trusted service providers like Stripe (payments) bound by confidentiality agreements. Never shared for advertising purposes.
Your Rights
Access, update, or delete your data anytime. Request a data export or deletion through support — we respond within 30 days.
Cookies
Essential cookies only — to keep you logged in and remember preferences. No third-party advertising cookies.
Contact
For privacy questions: [email protected]
By using MASSED you agree to this Privacy Policy. Updates will be sent via email and in-app notification.

massed.io/yourname — Public Preview
This is how visitors see your page

🏠 Main Dashboard

🚀 Getting Started

Your Dashboard is your command center. It starts as a welcome screen — click Start Here to go to Media Profile. Fill in your display name, bio, category, and contact info, then click Save Profile. The moment you save, your full established dashboard unlocks automatically.

👤 Profile Row (Top)

Shows your profile photo avatar (or your initial), your display name, and your public MASSED link (massed.io/yourname). Two buttons sit alongside it: How to Navigate — opens the full platform walkthrough; Support — opens the contact support panel.

📊 Analytics Row

Seven metric tiles across the top of your dashboard: Profile Views (total times your public page was visited), Orders Viewed (product page visits), Abandoned Carts (visitors who added but didn't buy — shown in red as a prompt to act), and Revenue broken into four timeframes: Today, This Week, This Month, and This Year.

⚠️ Alerts Panel

Low Stock — when any product's inventory falls to or below your low stock alert threshold, a yellow alert appears here with the product name and quantity remaining so you can restock before selling out. Abandoned Carts — shows how many carts were abandoned in the last 7 days as a prompt to send a follow-up offer or discount.

🎓 Graduation Countdown

Tracks your progress toward graduating from $30/month to a FREE 24-month plan. Shows which month you're on, your completion percentage, a progress bar, and your remaining balance. After 12 months → FREE 24-month plan → then $79.99/year forever.

💸 Earner Payouts vs Your Withdrawal

Ready to Pay Earners (purple) — total affiliate commissions currently owed to your earners. Click to go to Sales & Payouts to pay them. Available to Withdraw (green) — your net earnings after earner amounts are deducted. This is your money, ready to transfer to your bank account. Click to go to Payouts.

⭐ Reviews & Star Rating

Shows your current average star rating, total review count, and a "New Reviews" badge if any reviews have come in since your last visit. Click View → to go to the Reviews tab and read the full reviews.

⚡ Quick Start

Six shortcut buttons that open the add-item modals directly from the dashboard so you can start building immediately: Add Physical Product, Add Digital Product, Add Course, Add Listing, Add Web Link, and Billing. These are the same modals as inside each section — just one tap away.

🆕 What's New

A dark card at the bottom of the dashboard that highlights the most recent feature updates and improvements added to MASSED. Updated each time a new feature ships.

👤 Media Profile Guide

What it is: Your Media Profile is your public page at massed.io/yourusername — your digital business card for collaborators, customers and partners.

Where to find it: Tap Media Profile in the left sidebar.

How to set it up:

1. Upload a professional photo or brand logo.

2. Enter your Display Name exactly as you want it shown publicly.

3. Add your Title or Role so visitors know what you do.

4. Write your Bio — authentic, under 200 words. Tell your story, who you serve, what makes your brand unique.

5. Select your Category to help MASSED match you to the right audience.

6. Add Contact Info — email required, phone and website optional.

7. Click Save Profile. Changes are not auto-saved.

Collaboration tab: Toggle visibility on, pick your genres, browse creators, send and accept requests, message collaborators, and sign NDAs — all within MASSED.

Tips: High-res photo = 3× more views. Update your bio when your focus changes. Pick multiple genres to appear in more searches.

🛍️ My Store Guide

What it is: My Store is your public storefront — manage all products, digital downloads, and courses your audience can browse and buy at your MASSED link.

Tabs: Physical, Digital, Courses, and Visibility. Each has its own + Add button.

Physical Products — full form includes: Product name, price, sale price, tax rate, description, material/composition, up to 6 product photos (tap each slot to upload — first photo is the main image, others become thumbnails), inventory count, low stock alert (you're notified when stock hits this number), allow pre-order toggle (customers can pre-order when out of stock), fulfillment method (Shipped, Meet Up, Local Pickup, or Delivered — if Delivered, enter a delivery fee), available sizes (type and press Add — each becomes a selectable chip in the customer preview), available colors (pick a color and name it — appears as color dots customers can tap), gender, product category (choose Other to type a custom category — it gets added to all product forms system-wide), discount %, promo code, discount type, affiliate earner (set % or $ per sale earned — store shows "Affiliates earn X per sale"), add subscription option (set recurring price and frequency), requires membership (set tier), subscribe for product updates (customers notified on restocks/sales), hide from store.

Preview button: Opens a customer-view phone preview showing your images with thumbnail rail, size chips, color dot selector, stock status badge (● In Stock / ● Low Stock — Only N left / ● Out of Stock / ● Pre-Order Now), quantity selector, composition, Add to Cart button, affiliate earn banner, and update subscription banner.

Stock status on product cards: ● In Stock (green) · ● Low Stock (orange) · ● Out of Stock (red) · ● Pre-Order (purple). Available sizes shown as tags on the card.

Product card buttons: 👁 Preview (customer view), ✏️ Edit, eye icon to hide/unhide, 🗑 delete.

Digital Products: Same form minus shipping/size/color/preorder fields.

Courses: Same form plus Course Type (Complete Course or Course Upsell), cover image upload, and a preview video upload (MP4/MOV — plays inline in the form).

Custom Categories: Select "Other" in any category dropdown and type your own — it's added to Physical, Digital, and Course category dropdowns across the entire system instantly.

Visibility tab: Toggle each product type on or off for your live store page.

💰 Sales & Payouts Guide

What it is: Sales & Payouts is your financial command center — see all revenue, traffic data, and manage how you get paid.

Where to find it: Tap Sales & Payouts in the left sidebar.

Sales tab: Today's revenue, sessions, conversion funnel, traffic channels with interactive world map, top products, and social media analysis.

Payout tab: Available balance, processing funds, earnings breakdown by source, full transaction feed. Switch to Affiliate Earnings to see referral commissions.

Withdrawing: Connect your Stripe account in Settings → Stripe to enable direct bank payouts.

Graduation: Pay $30/month for 12 months and your plan becomes FREE for 24 months — then just $79.99/year. Track progress in Settings → Billing.

💬 Contact Support

📬 Our support team typically responds within 24–48 hours. For urgent billing issues, include your account email and a brief description.

💳 Add Payment Method

🔒 Your payment information is encrypted and processed securely through Stripe. MASSED never stores your card details.

🗺️ How MASSED Works

👤 Media Profile

Your public identity on MASSED — visible at massed.io/yourusername. Set your photo, display name, title/role, bio (under 200 words), category, and contact info. Click Save Profile — changes are not auto-saved.

Collaboration tab: Toggle your visibility on, choose your genres, browse other creators by genre, send and accept connection requests, message active collaborators, and sign legally binding NDAs. Signed NDAs auto-save to the Documents tab — click View to open the full signed document with both digital signatures and timestamps, or Download to save a copy.

My Hearts tab: See everyone who saved or hearted your profile, along with total heart count, hearts this week, and profile view stats.

Equal Link toggle: Found at the bottom of the Profile tab, below Contact Info. Turn it on to show visitors that you're open to linking with others. When enabled, an Equal Link badge appears on your public profile. A status indicator shows inside the dashboard confirming it's live. Toggle it off at any time to remove the badge.

🛍️ My Store

Your public storefront. Toggle Store Live to make it visible at your MASSED link. Click Preview Live Store to see exactly how your store looks to your audience. The store has four tabs: Physical, Digital, Courses, and Visibility. You can also navigate directly to each tab from the sidebar sub-items.

Physical Products: Up to 6 photos (first is main image, others become thumbnails), product name, price, sale price, tax rate, description, composition/material, inventory count, low stock alert (notifies you when stock hits the number you set), allow pre-order toggle, fulfillment method (Shipped / Meet Up / Local Pickup / Delivered — if Delivered, set a delivery fee), available sizes (type and Add — appear as selectable chips), available colors (pick color + name — appear as color dots), gender, category (type your own if you select Other — added to all forms system-wide), discount %, promo code, discount type (e.g. Christmas, New Years), product variants (same product in different flavors, styles, or editions — each with its own name and price), affiliate earner settings (% or $ per sale), subscription option, membership requirement, subscribe for product updates (customers notified on restocks/sales/drops), hide from store.

Product cards: Show stock status (● In Stock / ● Low Stock / ● Out of Stock / ● Pre-Order), sizes, color dots, variant count. Buttons: 👁 Preview (creator-side detail view), ✏️ Edit, 🤍 Heart (public can save), 👁/🚫 Hide/Unhide, 🗑 Delete.

Digital Products: Product name, price, sale price, tax rate, description, cover image, upload your digital file (PDF, ZIP, MP3, MP4, EPUB — customers receive instant download link after purchase), download support message (shown after purchase), product category (Ebook category included), variants, affiliate settings, subscription, membership requirement, product update subscriptions, hide from store.

Courses: Same full form plus Course Type (Complete Course = one purchase, full access; Course Upsell = individual lessons sold separately), course cover image, preview video upload (MP4/MOV plays inline). Buttons: 👁 Preview, ✏️ Edit, 🤍 Heart, Hide/Unhide, Delete.

Visibility tab: Toggle each product type (Digital, Physical, Courses, Bookings, Events, Services, Links, Videos) on/off for your live store page.

Custom categories: Select "Other" in any category dropdown and type your own — it's instantly added to Physical, Digital, and Course category dropdowns across the entire system.

🔗 Web Links

Add any URL to your public page — websites, landing pages, booking links, portfolios, or anything you want your audience to tap. Each link appears as a card on your MASSED profile with a cover image, title, and Open Link button. URL and Title are both required — the URL is validated before saving. Each card has: Copy · Analytics · ✏️ Edit · Delete. Edit opens a pre-filled modal to update URL, title, or swap the cover image.

📋 Listings

Found in the sidebar under Build → Listings. Listings is a browsing-based catalog for high-consideration items — inquiry first, no immediate checkout.

Who it's for: Real estate agents, independent car sellers, event venues (weddings, parties), Airbnb / short-term rentals, salon suite rentals, photography studios, office spaces, job postings, freelance gig listings, casting calls, brand ambassador roles, travel agents, travel packages, spa packages, party packages, and guided experiences.

Category tabs: All · 🏠 Real Estate · 🚗 Cars · 🏢 Spaces · 💼 Jobs · ✨ Experiences · ↩ Refunds.

Adding a listing: Title, category, primary CTA (Contact / Apply Now / Request Info / Reserve Interest / Book a Viewing / Inquire Now), price (auto-adds $ as you type) or toggle "Contact for price," location, description, up to 4 photos. Category-specific extra fields appear automatically — beds/baths/sqft for Real Estate, year/make/mileage for Cars, compensation and work type for Jobs.

Payment & Deposit: Toggle Send Payment Link to enter amount + recipient email/phone. Toggle Send Deposit Link to collect a hold deposit immediately to secure the customer's interest.

Listing cards: CTA button · 👁 Preview · 🤍 Heart (public can save) · 👁 Visible / 🚫 Hidden toggle · ✏️ Edit · 🗑 Delete. Hidden listings are dimmed. Preview opens a full-detail view with photo gallery, thumbnail rail, detail chips, full description, and CTA. Edit modal is pre-filled with all current data including photo swap.

Refunds tab: Process refunds with client name/email, amount, reason, and optional reference ID. Full refund history log maintained.

📅 Booking / Your Services

Found in the sidebar under Booking / Your Services. Two tabs: Services and Incoming Bookings.

Services tab: Add bookable services with name, price, duration, category (Hair / Beauty / Wellness / Consulting / Classes / + custom), description, optional cover photo. Classes — when selected, choose between Single Class (one-on-one) or Group Class (multiple students, set max capacity and location/platform). Toggle Booking Page Live to make booking visible. Each service card has Visible/Hidden, 🤍 Heart, and Delete. Category chips filter by type — add new categories with the + New Category button.

Deposit system: Toggle Require Deposit when adding a service. Set fixed dollar amount or %. Client pays upfront to secure their date; remaining balance collected at time of service.

Incoming Bookings tab: All booked appointments. Each shows client name, email, service, date, time, status, and deposit status. Tap Manage to: Reschedule, Send Deposit Request, Charge Fee (late/no-show/cancellation), Send Review Questionnaire, Cancel, Delete, or Ban from Booking.

Review Questionnaire: Build custom review questions with multiple-choice answers. 5-star rating always included. Send to any client from their Manage menu.

📱 Social Links

Connect Instagram, X/Twitter, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, Pinterest, LinkedIn, and Amazon. Each platform has a toggle — on shows publicly, off hides it. Only toggled-on platforms are visible to visitors.

🎬 Video

Upload or link videos. They appear directly on your public MASSED profile — audience watches without leaving your page. Add a title, genre, and duration for each video.

🎟️ Events / Tickets

Create in-person or online events. Set ticket tiers, prices, and capacity. Manage attendees and collect payments through Stripe. Use the built-in Ticket Scanner in the sidebar to scan QR codes at the door. Select Other as event type to type a custom type.

🔴 Go Live

Click the Go Live button in the top bar. Choose Go Live to connect with your audience, or Go Live & Sell to feature a product at a sale price with an optional countdown timer. Use ⏸ Pause to pause without ending, and End Live to close the session.

💰 Sales & Payouts

Sales tab: Today's revenue, sessions, conversion funnel, traffic channels with interactive world map, top products, and social media analysis.

Payout tab: Balance Breakdown (Available Now, Processing, Held), Earnings Overview, and Transaction Feed. Switch to Affiliate Earnings to see Top Earners with Pending/Paid status and Pay Now buttons. Once paid, tap View Receipt to see amount, recipient, date and time.

Payout Settings — sidebar sub-item under Sales & Payouts. Configure your payout preferences here.

⚙️ Settings

Five tabs: Settings (account, phone number, password change with 6-digit SMS code), Billing (plan, payment method, Manage Plan, Graduation Countdown), Stripe (connect Stripe account), Support (quick help guides, FAQ, contact support), and API (integrations — coming soon).

Graduation Countdown: Pay $30/month for 12 months → FREE 24-month plan → then $79.99/year forever.

❓ Support Tab (inside Settings)

Quick Help guides that open as popups: Media Profile, My Store, Sales & Payouts, this full platform walkthrough, and FAQ. The FAQ has 9 questions each with a ← Back button. Contact Support lets you send a message or create a ticket — team responds within 24–48 hours.

🌐 Browser Icon

Upload a PNG, JPG, or SVG favicon — auto-resizes to 16×16 and 32×32. Live browser tab preview shows exactly how it looks before applying. Set a custom Browser Tab Title. Click Apply Browser Icon to My Page to publish.

💳 Subscriptions / Subscribers / Memberships

Subscribers: Total count with avatars. Click any avatar for a read-only view of that subscriber's profile.

Subscriptions: Paid recurring accounts. Tap Manage: Charge Now, Change Amount/Type, Send Invoice, View Invoices, Refund, Cancel, Delete.

Memberships: Premium accounts. Tap Manage: Add to Plan (add family member with add-on billing), Change Plan, Charge Now, Send Invoice, View Invoices, Edit Info, Pause/Resume, Apply Fee, Waive Fee, Cancel, Delete.

Filters: All · Subscribers · Subscriptions · Memberships · Late/Overdue.

❤️ Hearts — Save Feature (Public)

Every Physical Product, Digital Product, Service, and Listing card has a 🤍 heart button. When the public taps it on your live page, it saves that item to their favourites. The heart fills (❤️) to confirm. Saved items appear in their account for easy reference later.

🔤 Other / Custom Fields

Anywhere you see Other — Event Type, Genre, Media Profile Category, Video Genre, Product Category, Booking Category — selecting it reveals a text field. For product categories, your custom entry is added to all three product form dropdowns (Physical, Digital, Course) system-wide instantly.

💡 This guide is updated each time a new section is completed. More features are being added — check back here for the latest walkthroughs.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

❓ What is MASSED?

MASSED is an all-in-one creator platform that gives you a public profile, a store, event ticketing, live selling, collaboration tools, and analytics — all under your own MASSED link. It is built for creators, service providers, and small business owners who want to sell, grow, and connect in one place.

❓ How much does MASSED cost?

MASSED costs $30/month on the Creator Pro plan. After 12 consecutive months of payments you graduate to a FREE 24-month plan — zero payments, keep every dollar you earn for 2 full years. After that it is just $79.99/year, forever. Track your graduation progress in Settings → Billing.

❓ How do I get paid?

Connect your Stripe account in Settings → Stripe. All sales, ticket revenue, and live selling payments go through Stripe and deposit directly to your bank account. You keep your earnings — MASSED does not take a cut of your sales.

❓ How do I make my store visible?

Go to My Store in the sidebar and toggle Store Live to on. Your store will immediately be visible at massed.io/yourusername. You can also choose which product types appear using the toggles inside My Store.

❓ What is the Collaboration feature?

Collaboration lets you find and connect with other MASSED creators. Go to Media Profile → Collaboration tab, toggle yourself visible, choose your genres, and start browsing. You can send connection requests, message accepted collaborators, and sign a legally binding NDA — all within MASSED. Signed NDAs automatically save to your Documents tab.

❓ How do I go live and sell a product?

Click the Go Live button in the top bar. Choose Go Live & Sell, select a product from your store, set a sale price, choose a timer if you want a countdown, and click Go Live & Sell. Your live banner will appear and your audience can purchase directly during the session.

❓ Can I control what shows on my public profile?

Yes. In Social Links you can toggle each platform on or off — only platforms with the toggle on will appear publicly. In My Store you control which product types are visible. Your store must also have the Store Live toggle on to be publicly accessible.

❓ How do I cancel or change my plan?

Go to Settings → Billing. You can manage your plan or cancel from there. To cancel, click Cancel Plan or contact support directly. We recommend reaching out first — our team may be able to help with any issues before you decide to cancel.

❓ How do I contact support?

Go to Settings → Support and click Send a Message or Create a Support Ticket. Fill in your subject, message, and email. Our team responds within 24–48 hours. For urgent billing issues include your account email in the message.

💳 Update Payment Method

🔒 Your payment information is encrypted and processed securely through Stripe. MASSED never stores your card details.

🌐 Browser Icon Guide

      
    

    

      
What it is: A favicon (Browser Icon) is the small icon that appears in your visitor's browser tab when they open your MASSED page. It makes your page feel like a real website — professional, trusted, and yours.

      
Where to find it: Tap Browser Icon in the left sidebar under the Publish group.

      
How to set it up:

      
1. Click the upload zone and select a PNG, JPG, or SVG file. A square image works best — recommended size is 512×512px.

      
2. Your icon will be automatically resized to 16×16 and 32×32 — the standard favicon sizes for all browsers.

      
3. Watch the live browser tab preview update instantly so you can see exactly how it will look before applying.

      
4. Optionally set a Browser Tab Title — this is the text that appears next to your icon in the tab (e.g. "Ava Stone | Creator").

      
5. Click Apply Browser Icon to My Page to save and publish it to your MASSED link page.

      
Why it matters:

      
✓ Makes your page feel like a real website — not just a link
✓ Builds trust when visitors open your page

      
Tips: Use your logo or a clean version of your brand mark. Avoid text-heavy images — they won't be readable at 16×16px. A simple symbol or initial works best.

    

    
  






  

    

      
🔒 Privacy Policy

      
    

    

      
What we collect: Name, email, phone number, profile content, and payment details you provide. We also collect usage data (pages visited, features used, device type) to improve your experience.

      
How we use it: To operate your account, process payouts, send opted-in notifications, and improve MASSED. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

      
Data sharing: Only with trusted service providers like Stripe (payments) who are bound by confidentiality agreements. Never shared for advertising.

      
Your rights: Access, update, or delete your data at any time. Request a data export or deletion by contacting support. We respond within 30 days.

      
Cookies: Essential cookies only — to keep you logged in and remember preferences. No third-party advertising cookies.

      
Questions? Email [email protected]

      
Last updated: March 2026. For the full policy go to Settings → Privacy tab.

    

    
  






  

    

      
🛡️ Account Security

      
    

    

      
Two-Factor Authentication (2FA): Go to Settings → Security and toggle on 2FA. This adds a second layer of protection — you'll need a code from your phone every time you log in.

      
Password change: Go to Settings → ⚙️ Settings tab. Enter your phone number and new password, tap Send Code to receive a 6-digit SMS code, enter it, and tap Verify.

      
Login activity: Settings → Security shows your recent login sessions — device type, browser, location, and time. If you see a session you don't recognize, sign out all other sessions immediately.

      
Security tips:

      
🔐 Use a strong password — at least 12 characters with numbers and symbols
📱 Enable 2FA for maximum protection
⚠️ MASSED staff will never ask for your password
🔒 Never share your login credentials

      
For full security settings go to Settings → Security tab.

    

    
  






  

    

      
🌐 Language Settings

      
    

    

      
Where to find it: Go to Settings → 🌐 Language tab.

      
How to change: Tap any language from the list to select it. The dashboard display language will update immediately.

      
Available languages: English 🇺🇸, Español 🇪🇸, Français 🇫🇷, Português 🇧🇷, Deutsch 🇩🇪, العربية 🇸🇦. More languages are being added regularly.

      
Note: The Language setting changes your dashboard language only. Your public MASSED profile language is set separately in your Media Profile settings.

      
For language settings go to Settings → Language tab.

    

    
  






  

    

      
📅 Booking Guide

      
    

    

      
What it is: Booking lets you add services that clients can book directly from your MASSED page — with date selection, time slots, and deposit collection built in.

      
Where to find it: Tap Booking in the sidebar under the Build section.

      
Adding a service:

      
1. Click + Add Service in the top right.

      
2. Enter the service name, price, duration, and category.

      
3. Add an optional description and cover photo.

      
4. Toggle Require Deposit on if you want clients to pay upfront. Set a fixed dollar amount or a percentage of the total. The remaining balance is collected at time of service.

      
5. Click Add Service to save and publish the card.

      
How the deposit works: When a client taps Book Now, they select a date from the calendar and pick a time slot. If a deposit is required, the confirm button shows the deposit amount (e.g. "Pay Deposit $30 → Book"). Tapping it processes the deposit and locks in the appointment.

      
Managing services: Each service card has a Visible/Hidden toggle to control whether it shows on your profile, and a Delete button to remove it.

      
Booking Page Live toggle: At the top of the Booking screen — flip this on to make your entire booking page visible on your MASSED profile. Flip it off to hide all booking from visitors.
